requirement_topic.en: BEE Star Labelling for LED Lamps
requirement_topic.zh: LED 灯 BEE 星级能效标识
requirement_topic.zht: LED 燈 BEE 星級能效標識

summary.en: The Bureau of Energy Efficiency administers Standards and Labelling for covered appliances, including LED lamps listed in the programme schedule. For notified LED lamp categories, BEE model registration, star-rating determination, label approval, and display of the prescribed label are compulsory before sale. Testing against the specified BEE programme requirements is mandatory for in-scope notified LED products.
summary.zh: 印度能效局（BEE）对计划附表涵盖的电器实施标准与标识管理，其中包括附表列明的 LED 灯。对于被通知的 LED 灯类别，销售前必须完成 BEE 型号注册、确定星级、取得标签批准并显示规定标签。适用的被通知 LED 产品必须按指定 BEE 计划要求进行测试。
summary.zht: 印度能效局（BEE）對計劃附表涵蓋的電器實施標準與標識管理，其中包括附表列明的 LED 燈。對於被通知的 LED 燈類別，銷售前必須完成 BEE 型號註冊、確定星級、取得標籤批准並顯示規定標籤。適用的被通知 LED 產品必須按指定 BEE 計劃要求進行測試。

standards_or_laws: BEE Standards and Labelling Programme for LED lamps

summary.en: China may require China Energy Label or other efficiency documentation for covered lighting products. China label grade thresholds, registration portals, and marking formats are separate from BEE star ratings and cannot be cross-used as India label approval.
summary.zh: 中国可能对适用照明产品要求中国能效标识或其他能效文件。中国标签等级阈值、注册平台和标识格式与 BEE 星级不同，不能作为印度标签批准交叉使用。
summary.zht: 中國可能對適用照明產品要求中國能效標識或其他能效文件。中國標籤等級閾值、註冊平台和標識格式與 BEE 星級不同，不能作為印度標籤批准交叉使用。

standards_or_laws: China Energy Label rules for covered lighting products

gap.en: BEE labelling is separate from BIS CRS. A product can need BIS registration for safety or notified CRS entry and still need BEE model registration for energy labelling. The star-rating method, label artwork, validity period, renewal cycle, and market surveillance files are India-specific.
gap.zh: BEE 标识与 BIS CRS 相互独立。产品可能因安全或被通知 CRS 条目需要 BIS 注册，同时仍需为能效标识进行 BEE 型号注册。星级计算方法、标签图样、有效期、续期周期及市场监管文件均为印度特定要求。
gap.zht: BEE 標識與 BIS CRS 相互獨立。產品可能因安全或被通知 CRS 條目需要 BIS 註冊，同時仍需為能效標識進行 BEE 型號註冊。星級計算方法、標籤圖樣、有效期、續期週期及市場監管文件均為印度特定要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for LED lamp categories notified as compulsory under the Energy Conservation Act notification or BEE schedule; testing, model registration, star-rating approval, and prescribed label display are required for in-scope notified products.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory only where Chinese energy-labelling law covers the China-market product; China labels are not accepted as BEE labels.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Check BEE status separately from BIS CRS. For notified compulsory LED lamp categories, BEE star labelling, model registration, and testing to the specified programme requirements are required; China efficiency labels do not replace BEE registration.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】应将 BEE 状态与 BIS CRS 分开核查。对于被通知为强制的 LED 灯类别，必须进行 BEE 星级标识、型号注册，并按指定计划要求测试；中国能效标签不能替代 BEE 注册。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】應將 BEE 狀態與 BIS CRS 分開核查。對於被通知為強制的 LED 燈類別，必須進行 BEE 星級標識、型號註冊，並按指定計劃要求測試；中國能效標籤不能替代 BEE 註冊。
